reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio de ruta, no cuenta con los mejores baños. Casi ninguna puerta cierra, no había jabón, ni alcohol en gel. Estaban limpios pero la falta de estos elementos así como la falta de mantenimiento eran notorias.

(Translated by Google)
This roadside gas station doesn't have the best restrooms. Almost none of the doors close properly, and there was no soap or hand sanitizer. They were clean, but the lack of these items and the lack of maintenance were obvious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2ajZhbHBnRRAB
